summary: Gruber announces a limited edition Daring Fireball t-shirt produced in collaboration with Coudal Partners' Swap Meat project. He jokes that Daring Fireball began as a t-shirt design project in 1979 when he was six years old, with the website coming 23 years later. The run is limited to 75 shirts in three sizes, each including a one-year DF membership.
key_points: Limited run of 75 Daring Fireball t-shirts produced through Coudal Partners' Swap Meat
Each shirt includes a one-year Daring Fireball membership or extension
Gruber frames the announcement with self-deprecating humor about the site's origins
money_quotes: All great projects begin the same way: by designing a t-shirt.
So it was with Daring Fireball, which I started work on in 1979 as a six-year-old.
key_insight: Even a brief merchandise announcement becomes an occasion for Gruber's signature deadpan wit.
